trade.summary: Bilateral trade has collapsed to near-zero following Russia's invasion of Ucraina and comprehensive Regno Unito sanctions. Pre-war trade was already limited compared to continental European partners due to lower Regno Unito-Russia energy dependence. Regno Unito sanctions among the most extensive globally. Residual trade is in humanitarian and exempt categories only.
disputes: Regno Unito-led effort to seize Russian state assets for Ucraina reconstruction

diplomatic.summary: Regno Unito-Russia relations are at their worst since the Cold War and arguably worse in some respects. The Salisbury poisonings (2018), the invasion of Ucraina (2022), and persistent Russian espionage and disinformation operations have destroyed the relationship. The Regno Unito has been among the strongest supporters of Ucraina and harshest critics of Russia. Regno Unito expelled 23 Russian diplomats in 2018. Russia has designated the Regno Unito an 'unfriendly country.'
recent_incidents: GRU cyber attacks on Regno Unito infrastructure (2023-2025)
Russian state-sponsored disinformation campaigns in Regno Unito
Regno Unito seizure of Russian oligarch assets
Litvinenko murder (Regno Unito court found Putin responsible)

military.summary: The Regno Unito and Russia are in a state of de facto proxy conflict through Ucraina. The Regno Unito was the first country to supply Ucraina with long-range missiles (Storm Shadow). Russian nuclear threats directed at the Regno Unito. Russian GRU and SVR actively conduct espionage and hybrid warfare against the Regno Unito. All bilateral military cooperation terminated.
incidents: UK Storm Shadow missiles supplied to Ukraine targeting Russia
GRU Unit 29155 assassination attempts in UK
Russian submarine activity near UK undersea cables

financial.summary: Regno Unito froze billions in Russian oligarch assets. 'Londongrad' — the term for London's role as a home for Russian wealth — has largely been dismantled through sanctions and enforcement actions. Regno Unito banks have exited Russia. Regno Unito law firms and accountants no longer serve sanctioned Russian clients.

energy.summary: The Regno Unito was never highly dependent on Russian energy (unlike continental Europe). Regno Unito has fully eliminated Russian energy imports under sanctions. Some residual LNG trade continues through third-country intermediaries but is minimal and declining.

scientific.summary: Scientific cooperation effectively terminated. Russian researchers excluded from Regno Unito-funded programs. Individual contacts continue at very low levels through unofficial channels. Joint scientific programs in nuclear, space, and arctic research all suspended.
